What doesn't kill them in this spa/hospital/grand hotel will only make them stronger as they make their way through an obstacle course of sexual temptations, mechanical contraptions and dietary breakthroughs. programme.desc: Neal Harvey, a world-renown shark handler in the Bahamas, teaches us how to put Reef Sharks into a relaxed state known as tonic immobility. Then, we head to NASA’s Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston, where astronauts train for space walking underwater.

programme.title: Surviving Mann

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The legendary Black Rambo returns to help the crew with an all new weapons system. A new course of fire, combined with some survival training, challenges the contestants’ mission readiness. After that, the contestants are instructed on how to build a shelter from a survival expert among their ranks.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The contestants are T-minus one day out from the critical mission and the heat is on. But before that, it wouldn’t be a Surviving Mann episode without some intensive PT. With a crash-course on how to build a sniper’s hide under their belts, the teams get their chance to get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: After another grueling PT session, the contestants are pushed to their limits with a new course of fire courtesy of Stag Arms. From long range, 500 yards, to standing, kneeling and a 100 meter dash- will anyone complete this challenging course of fire? After that, the teams are put through extensive land nav training.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: When the CIA calls, the All-Stars answer. The team is tasked with sabotaging a drug-smuggling boat before it can make its shipment. With mission success hanging in the balance, the All-Stars take their training up a notch, starting with a lesson in maritime navigation. From there, the contestants practice their tactical cast and turtleback swimming, but things take a turn when the contestants partake in a mile race against the current. Who will win and prove their water proficiency?

programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: 2024 TUDOR NAZARÉ Big Wave Challenge | REPLAY
programme.desc: The Big Wave tour resumed after 2 years at Nazaré to pristine conditions as the TUDOR Nazaré Big Wave Challenge started to roll. Watch as Big Wave heavies displayed critical teamwork to tow into massive Nazaré. Nazaré, Portugal is home to the biggest waves on Earth. In the TUDOR Nazaré Big Wave Challenge, two-person teams made up of men and women take turns surfing and driving the jetski as they compete in potentially record-setting surf. The WSL Big Wave season is the time of year when humans push the boundaries of what’s possible on a surfboard. In the sport’s premier paddle-only event at Jaws and tow surfing challenge at Nazaré, these men and women drop in and charge the impossible for the ride of a lifetime.

programme.title: 2025 TUDOR NAZARÉ Big Wave Challenge | REPLAY
programme.desc: The deepwater canyon of Portugal's famous Nazaré set the stage for Big Wave's finest to battle for the 2025 Tudor Nazaré Big Wave Challenge. Heavy wipeouts, full sends, and a clash of defending champs taking on perennial Big Wave standouts provided plenty of adrenaline-pumping action. Nic Von Rupp and Clement Roseyro emerged victorious with Justine Dupont stamping her authority at the arena of Nazaré once more to top the women's leaderboard alongside Roseyro taking the men's leaderboard win.

programme.title: 2023 Billabong Pro Pipeline Finals Day | REPLAY
programme.desc: As the epicenter of the surf universe and the birthplace of the sport, it’s only right for Pipeline to kick off the Championship Tour. Everyone enters the season with equal hopes of winning it all. The rookie class is thrown into the fire, the contenders return with one thing on their minds, and the surf world begins to follow the road to the Rip Curl WSL Finals. Pipeline sets the tone.

programme.title: WSL Competition Highlights
programme.desc: See all the best scores from the WSL surfing season.

programme.title: African Renaissance | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 3
programme.desc: Sam, Easkey, and Adrien catch up with West African surf legend Oumar Seye, the first West African sponsored surfer. Seye has impacted the surf culture in Senegal in more ways than one, both proving the sport can be more than a hobby and supporting sustainability by banning plastic bags at his surf events. They end their trip in Popenguine, a bohemian beach town where an incredible women-led initiative to plant thousands of trees has made the area one of the greenest parts of the country.

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot: Marvel Actor, TikTok Fitness Mom, & Top Comedian Find Thrills at Theme Park
programme.desc: Our local experts know the best thrills at Fun Spot. Orlando’s top comedian braves the gravity-defying SkyCoaster, a monster DJ and actor can’t stop screaming on White Lightning, and an influencer leaves all her followers behind on the go-kart track.

programme.title: Good Deed DIY: Expecting Mom Floored By New Nursery
programme.desc: Expecting mom Lacey does so much for her community but barely has time to take care of herself. Can Monica and friends create a serene, picture-perfect nursery in just 24 hours?

programme.title: Crimes, Cons and Capers: Fundraising Scams
